name: Eshwari
wish: I Love  You Kalla Darshan Mp

name: Shruthi
wish:
Happy Birthday Darshan MP! 🎉

For the biggest extrovert headache in our life 😌

Honestly, you are one of the most talented people I know. Whether it is dance, anchoring, comedy, or just making people laugh without even trying, you do everything perfectly.

Your dance has its own energy, your anchoring can make any stage come alive, and your comedy and humour are on another level. Even in the most boring situation, you somehow manage to make everyone laugh and enjoy.

You are the kind of person who can talk to anyone, entertain everyone, and still be everyone's favourite. You bring life wherever you go.

Yes, you are a headache sometimes, too loud, too dramatic, and too much to handle… but honestly, life would be so boring without you.

Keep shining, keep dancing, keep making people laugh, and keep being the amazing person you are.

YENRI NIMMA TALENT INNA RAASYA😅

Happy Birthday once again, idiot! ❤️

name: Pallavi
wish: I love you so deeply until it touch your heart
